title: SCIP Detect Output
description: Universal project detection schema for scip-* tools. Describes the project topology of a repository.

tool.description: The language or ecosystem (e.g. python, node, java).

root.description: Path to the workspace root, relative to the repository root. '.' for the repository root itself.

type.description: Workspace type: 'uv' for uv workspaces, 'poetry' for poetry monorepos with children, 'standalone' for single projects.

projects.description: Flat list of all projects in this workspace, including the root and all descendants.

name.description: Package or project name (e.g. my-lib, my-app).

path.description: Path relative to the repository root. '.' for the root project itself.

parent.description: Path of the parent project, or null if this is a workspace root.

producesArtifacts.description: Whether this project produces installable artifacts. False only for uv workspace containers with no [project] or [tool.poetry] section.

languages.description: Detected primary language(s) of this project's source files.

buildTool.description: Build tool or package manager (pip, uv, poetry, hatchling, setuptools, pipenv, etc.).

buildFiles.description: Build-related files present for this project (e.g. pyproject.toml, uv.lock, requirements.txt).

dependencies.description: Paths of sibling projects that this project depends on.

config.description: Build/compiler configuration detected for this project.

configFile.description: Path to the config file, relative to this project's path.
